message:
fix: idle polecat dirty sandbox detection matches actual cleanupStatus values (gt-5im9)

getCleanupStatus() returns 'has_uncommitted', 'has_stash', or 'has_unpushed'
for dirty states — never the literal string 'dirty'. Changed the condition
from == "dirty" to != "" && != "clean" so dirty idle polecats are properly
detected and reported.
